headline: Kalshi adds required employment verification for some prediction market bets
summary: Prediction market Kalshi now requires employment verification for certain bets. This comes amidst increased CFTC scrutiny and "insider trading" arrests. New regulations are being proposed to structure evaluation of such contracts.

headline: Claude Fable won’t answer basic biology questions
summary: Anthropic's new AI, Claude Fable 5, struggles with basic biology questions. Despite being touted as powerful in biology, it defers to older models. Users expect high school-level responses from the flagship AI.

headline: Microsoft, like, totally gets why students are booing AI-pilled graduation speakers
summary: College graduates are booing commencement speakers promoting AI. Microsoft's Brad Smith addressed the viral clips in a lengthy blog post. The company aims to foster dialogue between students and AI proponents.

headline: The future of AI regulation is courting the strangest, most anxious bedfellows
summary: AI regulation is creating unexpected alliances in Washington, D.C. The newsletter "Regulator" covers tech politics and influence. The complex landscape involves various stakeholders and concerns.

headline: Get an "Excellent Condition" PlayStation 5 DualSense Edge Controller for Just $133.99 at Best Buy
summary: Score a PlayStation 5 DualSense Edge Controller for $133.99. This Best Buy deal offers a 33% discount on the pro-grade controller. The controller is available in "Excellent Condition."

headline: Save $100 Off an Open Box Excellent Condition Asus ROG Xbox Ally X Handheld Gaming PC at Best Buy
summary: Save $100 on an Asus ROG Xbox Ally X handheld gaming PC. Best Buy offers an "Open Box Excellent Condition" unit. This is a deal for the most powerful Windows-based gaming handheld.

headline: Ridley Scott and Glenn Close to Receive Honorary Oscars at 2026 Governors Awards
summary: Director Ridley Scott and actress Glenn Close will receive Honorary Oscars. The awards will be presented at the 2026 Governors Awards. Disney animator Floyd Norman and Killer Films' producers also recognized.

headline: Every Fire Emblem Game on the Nintendo Switch and Switch 2 in 2026
summary: The Nintendo Switch currently hosts five Fire Emblem tactical RPG games. This article lists all available Fire Emblem titles for the console. It also speculates on releases for the upcoming Switch 2 in 2026.

headline: 'I'll never get over watching my home burn': Belfast residents reel after night of unrest
summary: Belfast residents faced a night of unrest, with homes set ablaze. Protests erupted following a knife attack in the city's north. Many were forced to flee their residences amidst the disorder.

headline: Essex Police given new information on West Ham co-owner David Sullivan
summary: Essex Police have received new information concerning David Sullivan. Sullivan is the co-owner of West Ham football club. This follows an investigation by BBC Panorama and The Times.

headline: Trump says US will hit Iran 'hard' again today
summary: Former US President Trump warned of striking Iran "hard" again. He stated Iran "will have to pay the price" for stalled deals. Tehran has vowed retaliation to any attacks.

headline: Changing visa rules for care workers is wrong, says Rayner
summary: Angela Rayner criticizes proposed changes to care worker visa rules. She argues altering rules for existing migrants is "un-British." The changes affect migrants already residing in the UK.
